title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER A — Papa-as-wolf walks around the tower-house (Three Little Pigs)
reuseAssetNote: ONE 15s render of Papa-as-cartoon-wolf softly walking around the tower-house, paired with Suno song 'Little Pigs Let Me Come In.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs (looped 8× with crossfade to fill the 120s music block). Loop choreography: smooth continuous walk, kids visible at windows the whole time.

usedUnderSongs.song: assets/music/Little Pigs Let Me Come In.mp3

prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show family-comedy shot at @playground-tower-house — wooden tower platform with closed-side panel walls + clear window openings, soft mulch ground at the bottom of the frame, soft warm afternoon light. POSITION LOCK — Sara stays inside the tower at the LEFT window throughout. Eva stays inside the tower at the RIGHT window throughout. Neither girl moves, climbs out, or falls. ONLY Papa moves — Papa paces in a SMOOTH CONTINUOUS slow circle around the tower-house perimeter, not teleporting between sides. Papa starts at the LEFT side of the tower at second 0, paces gently around to the BACK of the tower by second 5, paces gently around to the RIGHT side by second 10, paces gently around to the FRONT by second 15. ONE single continuous walk, no jumping between positions. @Papa already on the LEFT side of the tower-house at second 0 standing on the mulch with both feet planted, pacing in a continuous smooth slow circle around the tower over the 15 seconds, dressed in a goofy soft costume-y wolf-ear headband (NOT a scary wolf costume — just plain headband with soft floppy fabric ears). Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible at all times — gently raised in playful 'wolf' wiggle-fingers near his cheeks. Papa's expression is warm + comedic + theatrical, NEVER scary, NEVER growly. Big silly warm dad-grin throughout. @Sara already inside the tower-house at the LEFT window opening — her head + shoulders softly visible peeking out, ponytail with bow, both hands gripping the window frame. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both on the window frame. Sara stays at her exact window throughout. @Eva already inside the tower-house at the RIGHT window opening — her head + shoulders softly visible peeking out, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, both hands gripping the window frame. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both on the window frame. Eva stays at her exact window throughout. Soft cartoon hot-dog-shape confetti or pastel-cloud confetti drifts gently down through the frame in soft sock-hop atmosphere. The mulch and tower stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris. Papa knocks softly at each tower side as he passes — gentle 'knock-knock' on the wood — and silently mouths the wolf-words from the Suno song (no specific dialogue lip-sync). Kids playfully shake their heads NO at each window as Papa passes them. Camera locked, head-on / slight side angle. Bright cheerful warm afternoon lighting. The three of them act out the Three Little Pigs role-play silently — generic happy/cheeky/silly mouth movements, no specific lip-sync. Designed to LOOP cleanly: Papa returns to his original LEFT-side starting position at second 15. No audible speech, no music — silent render. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both gripping window frame. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both gripping window frame. Papa stays grounded with both feet on the mulch throughout — never leaves the ground, never climbs on the tower, never rushes. Both girls stay safely inside their tower windows throughout — no climbing out, no falling. NO scary wolf face, NO growl, NO dark lighting — pure cheerful kid-show comedy.
